statement.en: Deep learning image analysis of donor red blood cells to predict deformability and transfusion efficacy
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Thesis is embargoed with abstract unavailable; claims are unverifiable at present. The work describes a machine learning application to a real biomedical problem (RBC deformability prediction), which is theoretically sound, but without access to methodology, data, validation results, or peer review status, truth-value assignment is suspended. Classification as FLOWING reflects provisional status pending embargo expiration and peer validation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 細胞の形状と流動性の調和が、輸血後の生命力を測る。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 変形する赤血球が血管の流れの中で、内在する生命のリズムを刻む。
